scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Old Age Pension
page_title: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Old Age Pension

details: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir where financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons. The scheme is funded through Plan and Non-Plan on the basis of a 50:50 sharing pattern.
The scheme has the following components -
a) Pension for Old Age Person
b) Pension for Women in Distress
c) Pension for Physically Challenged Person

Under the "Pension for Old Age Person" component of ISSS, a pension of ₹1000 per pensioner per month is deposited directly into their Bank Account through DBT mode. The aim of the scheme is to provide monthly financial assistance to Old Age Pensioners who have meager support or no source of livelihood.
benefits: A pension of ₹1000 per pensioner per month is deposited directly into their Bank Account through DBT mode.
eligibility: The age of the applicant should be at least 60 Years for Men and at least 55 Years for Women.
The income of the applicant should be less than ₹ 75,000/- per annum or the applicant should be from the "Below Poverty Line (BPL)" Category.

offline: The application forms are available with DSWO/TSWO free of cost. The applicant shall submit the duly filled and signed application form (
).along with the required documents reg. the age, income, status, and address, to the concerned Tehsil Social Welfare Officer against proper receipt.

The concerned Tehsil Social Welfare Officer (TSWO) consolidates the list of eligible applicants under the scheme and forwards it to the concerned District Social Welfare Officer for the arrangement of funds and accord of sanction by a designated District level Sanctioning Committee headed by the Director General, Social welfare Department, Kashmir.
The amount is disbursed to the beneficiaries through bank advice/money orders.

documents_required: Proof of Residence (Ration Card / Voter Card, etc.)
Proof of Age (Birth Certificate / Medical Certificate / Aadhaar Card / Voter Card)
Income Certificate (of less than ₹ 75,000/- per annum or BPL Category)

faqs.question: Which Are The Components Of The ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme)?
faqs.answer: The ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) has the following components - a) Pension for Old Age Person b) Pension for Women in Distress c) Pension for Physically Challenged Person d) Pension to Transgenders

faqs.question: What Benefits Are Provided Under The "Pension For Old Age Person" Component Of ISSS?
faqs.answer: Under the "Pension For Old Age Person" component of ISSS, a pension of ₹1000 per pensioner per month is deposited directly into their Bank Account through DBT mode.

faqs.question: What Is The Aim Of The "Pension For Old Age Person" Component Of ISSS?
faqs.answer: The aim of the scheme is to provide monthly financial assistance to Old Age Person Pensioners who have meager support or no source of livelihood.

faqs.question: Is ISSS A Central Scheme Or A State Sponsored Scheme?
faqs.answer: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir

faqs.question: Who Are The Beneficiaries Of ISSS?
faqs.answer: The Beneficiaries Of ISSS can be Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons

faqs.question: Is There An Income Criteria For ISSS "Pension To Old Age Persons"?
faqs.answer: Yes, the income of the applicant should be less than Rs. 75,000/- per annum or the applicant should be from the "Below Poverty Line (BPL)" Category.

faqs.question: To Whom Shall The Application Be Addressed?
faqs.answer: The applicant shall submit the duly filled and signed application form (https://jkdswdj.jk.gov.in/pdf/FORMISSS1.pdf) to the concerned Tehsil Social Welfare Officer.

faqs.question: Who Is The Chairman Of The Pension Sanctioning Authority?
faqs.answer: The Chairman Of The Pension Sanctioning Authority shall be the Director General, Social welfare Department, Kashmir

faqs.question: Who Is The Member Secretary Of The Pension Sanctioning Authority?
faqs.answer: The Member Secretary Of The Pension Sanctioning Authority Shall Be The District Social Welfare Officer.

faqs.question: Who Are The Members Of The Pension Sanctioning Authority?
faqs.answer: The Members Secretary Of The Pension Sanctioning Authority Shall Be The Assistant Commissioner (Development), and the Chief Medical Officer.
